source_section.title_label_raw: Built Form and Siting Requirements within the WA Zone Applicability

sections.title_label_raw: Siting Requirements within the WA Zone Applicability

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements within the WA Zone Applicability
provisions.text: With the exception of main buildings within a heritage conservation district, any main building erected, constructed, reconstructed, altered, or located, or any addition to a main building, within a WA zone shall meet the built form and siting requirements of this Chapter. Maximum Building Height

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed
provisions.text: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed the maximum required building height specified on Schedule 15. Side Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: The minimum required side setback shall be 2.5 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required side setback shall be 2.5 metres.
provisions.text: The minimum required side setback shall be 2.5 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required side setback shall be 2.5 metres.
provisions.text: There is no maximum required side setback. Rear Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: There is no minimum required rear setback.

provisions.heading_context_raw: There is no minimum required rear setback.
provisions.text: There is no minimum required rear setback. Maximum Lot Coverage

sections.title_label_raw: No maximum required lot coverage applies.

provisions.heading_context_raw: No maximum required lot coverage applies.
provisions.text: No maximum required lot coverage applies.
